title: Tahir Takes al-Mada'in and Marches toward $arsar
description: In this year, Tahir b. al-Husayn took al-Mada'in453 from the forces of Muhammad jal-Aminj. From there he went toward 449• Fam al-Nil ("Mouth of the Nil Canal "), where the Nil Canal flowed into the Tigris, was a few miles above Fam al-5ilb. See Le Strange, Lands, 71-73.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 31
